response.justification: Candidate has broad full-stack experience but lacks the core mandatory requirements for this role. There is no recent professional C++ experience on Windows (only a brief 6-month stint at National Instruments in 2014-2015), no SQL Server/Oracle experience, and no exposure to fixed income, capital markets, or investment banking domains. The candidate's strengths in TypeScript/Node.js/DLang and web/mobile platforms do not align with this Windows C++ capital markets engagement.
strengths: Strong software craftsmanship background with TDD, CI/CD, and pairing experience
Demonstrated ability to work across multiple languages and adapt to new stacks
Excellent communication skills evidenced by workshops, talks, and teaching
concerns: Only ~6 months of professional C/C++ experience (2014-2015), far below the 5-10 year requirement
No SQL Server or Oracle experience; database background is MongoDB/MySQL
Zero exposure to fixed income, capital markets, or investment banking domains

key_factors.factor: No capital markets / fixed income domain knowledge
